reviews.review_title: Feels like a incomplete beta test game.
reviews.review_description: So much disappointment for a game that has the audacity to demand $39. Even on Black Friday deal at $23.99 I do not feel I was getting enough value. This game feels more like an incomplete beta game than anything. The visuals and fighting mechanics are so basic. The characters you fight look interesting yes, but the black environment with some floating light orbs looks so bland and simple. The characters you fight also can be said the same. All they do is basically either get close enough to you so you treat them like a punching bag, or once in a while they leap back after a hit. No matter if you hit softly or hit heavily. There’s no story, no instructions. Nothing. You’re just thrown into this black stage with the game title in giant size and the enemy appearing right by it. You choose and unlock different characters which are supposed to be harder I guess but I didn’t notice any difference. I truly cannot fathom why the developers think this is a game worth $39. There was nothing unique or special that I wouldn’t experience from even a $10 game.
